name: Lift Analysis
description: Know whether a campaign, sequence, or content push actually moved the needle above baseline — with statistical confidence, not gut feel.
alsoSurfaces: Did the campaign produce real lift, or were these conversions going to happen anyway?
What's the holdout-vs-treated delta with confidence intervals?
How long should we run before we have a defensible read?
beforeWeRun: Define the campaign or push — name, dates, audience selector?
Holdout group — statistical match or random sample?

whatYoullGet.name: Situation summary
whatYoullGet.desc: One-paragraph framing of the campaign and the question being tested.

whatYoullGet.name: Holdout comparison
whatYoullGet.desc: Treated vs. holdout metrics with effect size and confidence intervals.

whatYoullGet.name: Segment breakdown
whatYoullGet.desc: Lift by persona, region, or company size — segments where the effect is concentrated.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommendation
whatYoullGet.desc: Whether the lift is real and what to do next, with confidence level cited.

whatYoullGet.name: Sensitivity
whatYoullGet.desc: How the answer changes under different assumptions and windows.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your lift memo in ~14 min.
